scripts.dev: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w api && npm run lint -w web
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.codegen:openapi: npm run build:shared && npm run db:generate -w api && npm run export-openapi -w api && openapi-typescript packages/shared/openapi.json -o packages/shared/src/generated/openapi.ts && npm run build -w @approveflow/shared
